_comment: GitHub MCP server configuration for VS Code — enables the full-autonomous-cycle agent to create PRs, request reviews, and fetch review comments via the GitHub API.
_setup: 1. Copy this file to .vscode/mcp.json in your project (or merge into existing)
2. Set a GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable (classic token with repo scope, or fine-grained token with repository access and Pull requests read/write permission)
3. Reload VS Code — the GitHub MCP server will be available to all agents
